entries.title: Accessibility pass on the dev-log component, shipped as 0.1.9
entries.summary: Made the drop-in React dev-log feed fully keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible with proper disclosure semantics on the expand/collapse, and released it as 0.1.9.

entries.title: Shipped @natjswenson/devlog on npm — the personal dev-log skill, now shareable
entries.summary: Took the personal /devlog Claude Code skill, genericized it, wrapped it in an npx CLI, and shipped it to npm so the folks who pinged on LinkedIn can install it with one command.
